programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean worries about strange noises coming from next door. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James as the head of the family, struggling to keep his wife and children in tow

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is very surprised to find a well under his house. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James as the head of the family, struggling to keep his wife and children in order

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mildred faces the prospect of becoming a step-grandmother when George's past catches up with him. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack tackles what promises to be the most sensitive and unenviable investigation of his entire career - deciding whether a man with Down's syndrome is capable of committing murder. David Jason stars as the caustic copper, with Bruce Alexander and Matthew Marsh

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Walker is forced to confront his past when he undertakes his own unofficial investigation into a series of violent robberies around Aidensfield. Helen has to come to terms with the fact that her marriage is probably over when Matthew's mistress appears in the village, and David finds himself involved in some shady behaviour. Jonathan Kerrigan, Sophie Ward, Oliver Montgomery and David Lonsdale star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sophie is scared when Butch locks her in Zoe's house. Biff is desperately trying to get in shape for his fight. Alan bars Charlie from the pub until she can prove she is 18

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff is still determined to go ahead with the fight. Steve apologises to Kim for missing their lunch date. Kim questions Sophie about her relationship with Zoe

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maureen invites Bill round for the evening. Jack gets Jamie to agree to stop skiving off school. Des tells Claire that he cannot let her turn her back on the money

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Claire is upset that Des will not commit to her. Don spoils Ashley's plans to go out with Kelly. Ken goes to Southport with Sue, and Deirdre warns him to be on his guard

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Spurred into action by the discovery of a woman's body in Midsomer Worthy's Raven's Wood, Barnaby and Troy re-examine three similar unsolved murders in the same village nine years previously, hoping to get a lead before the killer strikes again. As they dig deeper into the clandestine world of the community, they find themselves embroiled in a sinister web of deceit, violence and mystery. Guest starring Phyllis Logan, and featuring Toby Jones' first appearance in a recurring role as pathologist Dan Peterson

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Gruff detective Jack Frost's plans for a quiet weekend are disrupted by the gruesome discovery of an unidentified body floating in the river. However, soon after he has begun the investigation, he is forced to apply his deductive skills to a separate case involving an act of violence during a football match which left a player in a coma. Crime drama, starring David Jason, Larry Lamb, Bruce Alexander, Lindy Whiteford and Berwick Kaler

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A masterpiece by landscape artist Henry Hogson causes a stir when it is auctioned for £400,000 after a fierce bidding war - and hours later, its former owner is tortured and killed. When a Hogson work is then stolen, Barnaby and Jones research the Midsomer painter with the help of art teacher Matilda Simms. They soon uncover evidence of forgery - but the killer is still at large. Guest starring David Bamber and Susannah Harker, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. With Pamela Jefferies in a coma following her vicious attack, Banks becomes more determined to find Rothwell's killer. Convinced a vital clue is staring him in the face, he resolves to learn more about Keith Rothwell and, against orders, questions MP Martin Fleming, putting him on a collision course with rival DCI Burgess. Meanwhile, the return of Tom Rothwell to the UK presents Helen with another suspect and an opportunity to put pressure on his family. With Patrick Baladi

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is asked to investigate the disappearance of a bank's most valued customer, who had been planning to sell the chairman a map showing where to find a long-lost silver mine. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirot's help. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.desc: Henpecked George finally finds a job, but the line of work could make him unpopular with road users. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A confrontation between hunt stewards and saboteurs leads to the suspicious death of a protester - and makes Jack wonder whether the thrill of the chase has given the horsey set a taste for human blood. Whodunit, starring David Jason as DI Frost, with Bruce Alexander, Sean Pertwee, Del Henney and Tat Whalley

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Veteran singer and keyboard player Alan Price guest stars in this festive episode of the rural drama, as the leader of a jazz band. Travelling to Aidensfield, where they've been booked by Vernon to play at the villagers' Christmas concert, the Rio Trio offer a lift to a girl, unaware she is a single mum taking her baby home to see her parents for the holiday. However, the first the band know about the infant is when the girl disappears, leaving them to look after it. Meanwhile, as the concert gets into full swing, local barmaid Gina takes centre stage, hoping to impress all and sundry with her rendition of Winter Wonderland. Tricia Penrose, Derek Fowlds, Geoffrey Hughes, William Simons and Mark Jordon star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve spends another night with Kim. Kelly starts a fight with Lyn Hutchinson. Zoe phones the police when Sophie realises her overnight bag has been stolen

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff embarks on a fitness regime. Zak makes Butch swear that he was not at Zoe's the previous night. Billy turns up unannounced at the Sugdens' home to see Andy

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Becky stands up for Jamie when Lauren teases him about his dad being in prison. Ken tells Deirdre he fears Sue is attracted to him. Tricia is annoyed that she cannot divorce Carl

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Raquel tells Curly if he wants children he needs to show commitment. Ken tries to get out of going to the conference with Sue. Roy catches Jamie skiving off school

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Community spirit in the village of Morton Fendle is dealt a blow by the collapse of a craft centre in which many locals had invested - and Alan Hollingsworth, the businessman behind the project, has become a public hate figure. Barnaby investigates when Hollingsworth's wife disappears, and seems to have been kidnapped. However, when Hollingsworth is subsequently murdered and his wife reappears safe and sound, he suspects an elaborate scheme. Roger Allam guest stars

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack tackles what promises to be the most sensitive and unenviable investigation of his entire career - deciding whether a man with Down's syndrome is capable of committing murder. David Jason stars as the caustic copper, with Bruce Alexander and Matthew Marsh

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth falls asleep during a flight from Paris to London, while a female passenger is murdered by a poisoned dart, leaving few clues to the killer's identity. Poirot soon discovers she was a money-lender, which may provide a motive for the killing. The investigation is turned on its head, however, when the victim's illegitimate daughter comes forward to claim the inheritance. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with David Firth, Jenny Downham and John Bleasdale

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. A professional hitman bursts into the luxurious family home of accountant Keith Rothwell and shoots him in cold blood. Banks is instantly struck by the strange reactions of the victim's family and evidence comes to light that Rothwell has been living a secret double life. Now investigating the murder of a victim with two identities, Banks and Morton discover a possible link to a major money-laundering operation and are plunged into a high-profile fraud investigation with political ramifications

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates the murder of her old friend Father Gorman, using a list of names sent by the priest moments before his death to bring the guilty party to justice. Following a trail of clues to London, Marple is drawn to the Pale Horse Inn - where she discovers a sinister world of occult practices. Drama, starring Julia McKenzie in the title role, with Lynda Baron, Pauline Collins, Nicholas Parsons and Neil Pearson

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack tackles what promises to be the most sensitive and unenviable investigation of his entire career - deciding whether a man with Down's syndrome is capable of committing murder. David Jason stars as the caustic copper, with Bruce Alexander and Matthew Marsh

programme.desc: Sid is in for a shock when he finds out who Jean has enlisted to decorate Mike's bedroom

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean worries about strange noises coming from next door. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James as the head of the family, struggling to keep his wife and children in tow

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is very surprised to find a well under his house. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James as the head of the family, struggling to keep his wife and children in order

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mildred faces the prospect of becoming a step-grandmother when George's past catches up with him. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack tackles what promises to be the most sensitive and unenviable investigation of his entire career - deciding whether a man with Down's syndrome is capable of committing murder. David Jason stars as the caustic copper, with Bruce Alexander and Matthew Marsh

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Walker is forced to confront his past when he undertakes his own unofficial investigation into a series of violent robberies around Aidensfield. Helen has to come to terms with the fact that her marriage is probably over when Matthew's mistress appears in the village, and David finds himself involved in some shady behaviour. Jonathan Kerrigan, Sophie Ward, Oliver Montgomery and David Lonsdale star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sophie is scared when Butch locks her in Zoe's house. Biff is desperately trying to get in shape for his fight. Alan bars Charlie from the pub until she can prove she is 18

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff is still determined to go ahead with the fight. Steve apologises to Kim for missing their lunch date. Kim questions Sophie about her relationship with Zoe

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maureen invites Bill round for the evening. Jack gets Jamie to agree to stop skiving off school. Des tells Claire that he cannot let her turn her back on the money

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Claire is upset that Des will not commit to her. Don spoils Ashley's plans to go out with Kelly. Ken goes to Southport with Sue, and Deirdre warns him to be on his guard

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Spurred into action by the discovery of a woman's body in Midsomer Worthy's Raven's Wood, Barnaby and Troy re-examine three similar unsolved murders in the same village nine years previously, hoping to get a lead before the killer strikes again. As they dig deeper into the clandestine world of the community, they find themselves embroiled in a sinister web of deceit, violence and mystery. Guest starring Phyllis Logan, and featuring Toby Jones' first appearance in a recurring role as pathologist Dan Peterson

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Gruff detective Jack Frost's plans for a quiet weekend are disrupted by the gruesome discovery of an unidentified body floating in the river. However, soon after he has begun the investigation, he is forced to apply his deductive skills to a separate case involving an act of violence during a football match which left a player in a coma. Crime drama, starring David Jason, Larry Lamb, Bruce Alexander, Lindy Whiteford and Berwick Kaler

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A masterpiece by landscape artist Henry Hogson causes a stir when it is auctioned for £400,000 after a fierce bidding war - and hours later, its former owner is tortured and killed. When a Hogson work is then stolen, Barnaby and Jones research the Midsomer painter with the help of art teacher Matilda Simms. They soon uncover evidence of forgery - but the killer is still at large. Guest starring David Bamber and Susannah Harker, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. With Pamela Jefferies in a coma following her vicious attack, Banks becomes more determined to find Rothwell's killer. Convinced a vital clue is staring him in the face, he resolves to learn more about Keith Rothwell and, against orders, questions MP Martin Fleming, putting him on a collision course with rival DCI Burgess. Meanwhile, the return of Tom Rothwell to the UK presents Helen with another suspect and an opportunity to put pressure on his family. With Patrick Baladi

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is asked to investigate the disappearance of a bank's most valued customer, who had been planning to sell the chairman a map showing where to find a long-lost silver mine. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirot's help. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Gruff detective Jack Frost's plans for a quiet weekend are disrupted by the gruesome discovery of an unidentified body floating in the river. However, soon after he has begun the investigation, he is forced to apply his deductive skills to a separate case involving an act of violence during a football match which left a player in a coma. Crime drama, starring David Jason, Larry Lamb, Bruce Alexander, Lindy Whiteford and Berwick Kaler

programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: Richard John Neil presents from Brands Hatch, featuring round four of the Dunlop Mini Challenge and round three of the Porsche Carrera Cup GB

programme.title: DTM Highlights 2020
programme.desc: The mid-way point of the 2020 DTM season is held on the GP layout of the famed Nurburgring. The venue for Round 5 in the Eifel region is notorious for its weather - as well as spectacular overtaking moves into turn one. The Nurburgring saw the lone win for Britain's Jamie Green in the 2019 season, as the Audi driver will be tested against new competition including former F1 star Robert Kubica.

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the 20th and penultimate stage of the most prestigious race on the calendar, featuring a 36.2km individual time-trial between Lure and La Planche des Belles Filles. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 is assigned to protect an Middle Eastern diplomat who is being pursued by assassins. Bodie and Doyle find themselves relentlessly pursued by a gang of assailants that seems able to accurately anticipate their every move, leading to a tense car chase and a riverside shoot-out. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The Contessa gives Harry a shotgun for his birthday, which he is soon given cause to use when he becomes the target of a manhunt while investigating political blackmail

programme.title: World Series of Darts Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the afternoon session on day three of the tournament, staged at the Salzburgarena in Austria, featuring the quarter-finals. Presented by Jacqui Oatley, with analysis by Chris Mason and Alan Warriner-Little, and commentary by John Rawling and Stuart Pyke

programme.title: Tour de France Live 2020
programme.desc: Coverage of the 21st and final stage of this year's race, as the riders take on a flat 122km course from Mantes-la-Jolie to the Champs-Elysees in the heart of Paris. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: From Canada's waterlogged wilderness come stories of a 20ft lake monster that attacks humans. For freshwater detective Jeremy Wade, investigation turns into obsession as he tries to explain widespread accounts of the aggressive serpent-like beast

programme.title: World Series of Darts Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the evening session on day three of the tournament, staged at the Salzburgarena in Austria, featuring the semi-finals and final. Michael van Gerwen and Danny Noppert defeated Mensur Suljovic and Dave Chisnall respectively in the last four of 2019 to set up an all-Dutch final, and van Gerwen proved to be too much for his compatriot, comfortably prevailing 11-2. Presented by Jacqui Oatley, with analysis by Chris Mason and Alan Warriner-Little, and commentary by John Rawling and Stuart Pyke

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Jimmy Bullard and Jamie O'Hara join team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey at Anglers Paradise in Devon, trying to catch ornamental koi carp, blue orfe and golden tench

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle investigate the death of a burglar who was killed after seeing classified information about a foreign country, and resort to theft in a bid to uncover the embassy's sinister secrets. Liz Fraser and Michael Elphick guest star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Boxer Lewis Nelson hires Ray to keep his gambling-addicted wife away from the casino he partly owns. However, she persuades Arthur to play the roulette wheels on her behalf, tempting him with the 'winning system' she has devised. Comedy starring George Cole

programme.title: Football Rivalries
programme.desc: The intense rivalries between football teams across Europe, focusing on north London sides Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A business tycoon is blackmailed for his part in a massacre while serving in the Army 25 years earlier. However, his problems are compounded after he seeks help from his former commanding officer. Colin Jeavons guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An elderly widow enlists Holmes' help to ascertain why a mystery purchaser should want to buy not just her house, but also all its contents. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett, Edward Hardwicke and Peter Wyngarde

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel track down a blackmailing assassin who scares his victims into meek compliance by carrying out fake murders. Vintage hokum, with Patrick Macnee, Diana Rigg and Simon Oates

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: When Ray's van breaks down, Arthur takes to the water using a barge to transport a cargo of dodgy video recorders. However, the fearsome Bible-quoting Welshman who owns them is on his tail. George Cole and Gary Webster star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle investigate the death of a burglar who was killed after seeing classified information about a foreign country, and resort to theft in a bid to uncover the embassy's sinister secrets. Liz Fraser and Michael Elphick guest star

programme.desc: A business tycoon is blackmailed for his part in a massacre while serving in the Army 25 years earlier. However, his problems are compounded after he seeks help from his former commanding officer. Colin Jeavons guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar is persuaded to shadow a defecting civil servant who has been duped into carrying confidential papers to East Germany. Guest starring Ronald Hines

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A man dies suddenly of a mysterious fever and Holmes suspects murder, but a malign influence takes its toll on the detective as he delves into the underworld of London's docklands. Starring Jeremy Brett, with Roy Hudd

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel track down a mysterious glowing man responsible for a string of macabre and grisly murders. Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg star, with a guest appearance by Ray McAnally

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's plans to rig the Winchester's quiz night go awry when the questionmaster, an escaped convict, surrenders himself to the police officers present after suffering a turn. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The resources of CI5 are stretched when a mentally unbalanced former soldier starts killing hospital staff, believing them responsible for the death of his wife and for the brain damage suffered by his young daughter. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The son of an ex-informant is kidnapped and the Flying Squad is brought in to assist in the hunt. Against Regan's advice his father, a wealthy businessman, pays the ransom and the boy is returned. However, the reunion quickly turns sour. Joss Ackland guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the 21st and final stage of this year's race, as the riders took on a flat 122km course from Mantes-la-Jolie to the Champs-Elysees in the heart of Paris. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jeremy Wade takes on the biggest investigation of his career - to unravel what happened to the passengers of the RMS Laconia in the Atlantic

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: The team film their first-ever episode in the UK, from the Wasing Estate in Berkshire, which has a number of lakes and was previously the home of the British record carp. Ali, Neil and Tom find it difficult to tempt the carp as this lake has been fished regularly by other anglers, and these old fish have seen everything over the years

programme.title: Predators (2010)
programme.desc: Hardened fighters from all over the world, including military veterans and ruthless criminals, are abducted by aliens and transported to a dangerous jungle world. As they struggle to survive, they discover why they have been brought to the planet - to be used as prey in a big-game hunt. Sci-fi thriller sequel, with Adrien Brody, Topher Grace, Alice Braga, Danny Trejo and Laurence Fishburne

programme.desc: Documentary featuring dash-cam video footage of astonishing accidents, spectacular smashes and enthralling escapes from South Africa and America

programme.desc: Richard John Neil action from Brands Hatch, featuring round five of the Ginetta GT4 Supercup and round six of the Ginetta Junior Championship

programme.desc: On Murtagh's first day as interim captain, the wife of a popular businessman is abducted, and the squad finds a connection to Riggs' father (guest star Rex Linn). Meanwhile, Riggs is left to grapple with his family life and work commitments. Clayne Crawford and Damon Wayans star

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad trails diamond thief Jimmy Fleet on the inside, with Carter acting undercover as a fellow prisoner aiming to gain his confidence. On his release for lack of evidence, Fleet seeks Carter's assistance after discovering his girlfriend has vanished with the jewels, suspecting she has been abducted. Michael Elphick guest stars

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar sets out on the trail of a former Nazi believed to have taken refuge in South America. Vintage drama, guest starring Francesca Annis, Roger Delgado, John Barrie and Maurice Kaufmann

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Mycroft Holmes joins his brother to investigate the murder of a professor's secretary. The only clue is a golden pince-nez found clenched in the hand of the victim. Charles Gray guest stars

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: A friend of Emma's returns from abroad in the hope of retiring to Little Storping-in-the-Swurf, but discovers the village is harbouring a secret. Starring Diana Rigg and Patrick Macnee

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur buys a hot-air balloon and attempts to break into aerial advertising. However, he is later abducted by a psychotic business rival who takes him to a disused power station, leaving Ray with the puzzle of how to track him down. George Cole and Gary Webster star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are asked to keep a surveillance on Cowley after evidence suggests he has stolen two canisters of a lethal nerve gas and begun negotiating with an unfriendly foreign power. The plot thickens when they trace their boss to a country mansion, where after they are caught he denies knowing them

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Guest stars Eric Morecambe and Ernie Wise are entrusted to guard a consignment of heart pills by the girlfriend of the eminent research chemist developing the medicine. Before long, the comedy duo find themselves pursued by Middle Eastern operatives intent on procuring the new drug, as well as Sweeney officers who are trying to protect them. With John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five family members answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Subjects in this episode include the Winter Olympics, Tudor monarchs and the US

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the sixth round of the season at the Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya in Montmeló. Great Britain's Jonathan Rea and Scott Redding, of Kawasaki and Ducati respectively, were the top two in the standings going into this round

programme.title: World Rally Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The Rally Turkey. Action from the fifth round of the campaign, as the drivers navigated rocky gravel roads in the mountains of the south west of the country

programme.title: Planet of the Apes (2001)
programme.desc: An astronaut crash-lands on a strange planet and is captured and enslaved by the ruling race of highly intelligent apes. Luckily, he is helped by a sympathetic chimpanzee - but then discovers a shocking secret. Remake of the 1960s sci-fi adventure, directed by Tim Burton and starring Mark Wahlberg, Helena Bonham Carter and Tim Roth, and featuring a cameo appearance from the original film's star Charlton Heston

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Live Heineken Champions Cup Rugby Union
programme.desc: Toulouse v Ulster (Kick-off 12.30pm). Lee McKenzie presents coverage of the quarter-final at Stadium Municipal. Toulouse were in impressive form as they topped their pool ahead of Gloucester, Montpellier and Connacht with a 100 per cent record, while Ulster finished second in their pool behind Clermont Auvergne, winning five matches and losing just one. With analysis from Stephen Ferris, and commentary by Miles Harrison and Nolli Waterman

programme.desc: Gill and Paul are retiring to Dorset and they're looking for a home they can futureproof. Gill would like to live near to the Jurassic Coast with its stunning sea views, whereas Paul would prefer to be further inland within walking distance of a quaint country pub. Kirsty Duffy entices them to the country with three properties within their budget of £630,000, while Kerr Drummond tries to turn the tide with three stunning coastal properties for them to view

While Angel completely overhauls the old nautical interior with bespoke fabrics and unique crafts, Dick has the small task of installing the boat's very own wind turbine and a decking that reaches over the moat

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: Beneath vast mountains and across open moorlands, Scotland's railways connect coastal towns and rural villages through a Highland landscape voted the world's most beautiful railway. This programme meets the people who work on the railway and the steam enthusiasts who safeguard these iconic routes, offering a glimpse into a diverse community united by a passion for the nation's railways

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: In Devon, George visits one of the National Trust's quirkiest buildings, a bear hut on the 6400-acre Killerton estate. The main house was given away because of the socialist ideals of the aristocratic family who lived there. George unearths secrets and scandal at Baddesley Clinton Hall, a fortified Tudor manor house in Warwickshire where in the past the architecture has meant the difference between life and death, then heads home to the north-east for a walk through Gibside Estate, a landscape park with royal connections and crowned with jaw-dropping architecture

In a last-ditch attempt to pay off his creditors, he risks everything - including his life - on one last game. Thriller, starring Mark Wahlberg, Jessica Lange and John Goodman

Meanwhile, Sam Jones and Matt Coogan head to the scene of a mortar bomb discovery, while Sergeant Alex 'Swansea' Hughes is called to Llandudno, where a magnet fisherman has taken a mortar that he's found to work

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shares his simple take on a butter chicken curry with less spice, fewer ingredients and less washing up, making it the perfect meal for family life. Jamie also takes a salmon en croûte - a showstopper dish normally reserved for impressing at dinner parties - and creates an easy one-pan dish on a bed of greens and encased in golden puff pastry

programme.title: Brain Surgeons: Between Life and Death
programme.desc: Documentary following patients undergoing life-changing brain surgery at the Neurological Centre in Southampton - one of Britain's foremost neurosurgical units, where some of the most difficult and complex operations in the country are performed. Twelve-year-old Matthew faces a gruelling two-day operation to remove an extremely rare tumour deep in his mid-brain, next to his pineal gland. This is a region key to the functioning of sight, muscles, hearing and sensation. With access to the hospital's team of leading paediatric surgeons, the programme follows the doctors' attempts at a delicate and risky operation, which could save Matthew's life

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The edition focuses on the rapidly growing number of 999 calls connected to the over-75s. In Warminster, the emergency services are called to a crash involving three cars, which has left one person with life-changing injuries and was caused by a 75-year-old man who suffered a suspected heart attack at the wheel. PC Phil Bridge is searching Trowbridge to find a 73-year-old woman who is in the latter stages of dementia and has disappeared while out shopping with her son

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An episode following the stories of fathers and sons and the bonds between them. John is rushed into St George's with a life threatening abdominal aortic aneurism. As the doctors work out whether they can save the 77-year-old's life with emergency surgery, his only son discusses the prospect of losing his father. Elsewhere, cameras follow Jamie, whose motorbike collided with a car on a motorway slip road on his way to work, and carpenter Noel arrives in A&E after partially amputating his thumb

programme.title: Call the Cops
programme.desc: An inexperienced officer ends up in a dangerous high-speed car chase on only his third day on active duty, and then has to deal with an unprovoked attack on an elderly man in a supermarket car park. A former soldier, who lost his leg while serving in Afghanistan, finds policing Exeter a far more relaxing line of work - but a pub brawl tests even his battle-hardened resilience to the limits. programme.desc: Monica is annoyed by the fake laugh Chandler uses at work whenever his boss cracks a joke, and the gang gets a shock when Ross introduces his new girlfriend

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Ross and John put their armed-response training to the test when they tackle a suspected gunman, while teams are called out to deal with the results of dangerous driving after a person parks on a roundabout and a pedestrian is crushed under a car. Elsewhere, officers raid a cannabis farm, a Reliant Robin is bid a fiery farewell, and Phil finds out what happens when the driver of a Subaru Impreza decides to take on an HGV

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A look at some of the challenges that Spring can bring to Yorkshire's livestock, wildlife and pets. Peter Wright is called out to a late-night lambing emergency at a local farm as a young ewe struggles to give birth. Farmer Rodney's sheepdog Jet needs his and Julian Norton's help as she has a huge cancerous tumour that needs removing

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Sheep shearing season is well under way, but while one young ewe was having her annual trim, there was a terrible accident - Julian Norton arrives to find she's been impaled on a trailer. Cameras also follow pygmy goat Jo, who got her horns stuck in a fence, and now needs help to get free

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton is called to a late-night calving at local farmer Richard's place to try to help a big calf called Moobaloo. Peter Wright rushes into the practice after a member of the public brings in an owl they suspect was hit by a car. And much loved cat Princess is brought in with a mysterious and horrifying wound on her back end

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter Wright must brave snow blizzards as The Beast from The East arrives and isolates Yorkshire Farmers living on higher ground. The weather doesn't stop him heading out to look at a young cow who's just given birth and is suffering from severe pneumonia

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Siegfried applies to become attending vet at Darrowby racecourse - but the position comes with conditions, and he is torn between his ambition and his loyalty to the practice. Tristan collects the debts owed to the surgery, but ends up losing all the money and resorts to placing a risky bet to cover up his mistake. When the favourite to win on the race day is diagnosed with a inoperable condition, James has his first painful experience of having to put an animal down - only to end up being threatened with legal action by the owner

programme.title: Yorkshire Tea vs PG Tips: Battle of the Brews
programme.desc: A look at two of Britain's leading producers of tea - the traditional favourite PG Tips and Yorkshire Tea, which topped the tea sales charts for the first time in 2019. These two brands go head to head in a series of categories examining issues including sales, heritage and innovation

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence

programme.title: Gypsy Eviction: The Battle for Dale Farm
programme.desc: Although travellers legally owned the land of Dale Farm in Essex, they did not have planning permission to develop it and the site grew in size. Early attempts by the council to move them on were thwarted by the New Labour government, and the adoption of the Human Rights Laws resulted in a stalemate between the resident travellers and the council that lasted a decade. Through interviews with people on both sides of the eviction, this film looks back at the dramatic events of 2011

programme.title: Old Wife, New Wife
programme.desc: Observational documentary in which a couple move in with the man's ex-wife for a week in an attempt to heal old wounds and allowing them to get to know each other as individuals and not as enemies. This time, Nadine invites her ex Paul and his new partner Mursine to live with her because she knows nothing about the woman who now helps to care for her children. With two strong women connected to Paul and the children, all the adults are apprehensive about the week-long experiment

programme.title: McDonald's vs Burger King: Burger Wars
programme.desc: Documentary examining how the fast food giants grew from humble origins to become two of the most recognisable brands in the world. The programme assesses the chains' marketing ploys and promotional techniques, while vloggers and food critics compare the rivals' most notable products and the ways in which they are presented. Industry insiders also reveal the secrets behind both chains' success and how they see off the competition

programme.title: It's Your Fault I'm Fat
programme.desc: Brighton-based Josh says he eats because he is bored _ and also to drown out the sounds of arguing from his parents. Cameras focus on the 16-year-old who weighs more than 20 stone

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team, alongside the FBI and MI6, continues the international manhunt for a disgraced British spy who is seeking revenge on the agents he blames for his wife's death. A re-examination of the fugitive's conviction for selling military intelligence reveals that he may have been framed - and the identity of the only person who can clear his name

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: How to Add 20k to Your Home
programme.desc: Britain's best-loved TV property and interior experts share the secrets of adding value to a property in the most budget-friendly way possible. Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen, Linda Barker, Scarlette Douglas, Laura Hamilton and Gary McCausland present a number of projects, including converting a garage into a bedroom or cinema room, installing a home office in the garden, and creating an open-plan living space by knocking down walls between kitchens and sitting rooms. What's more, with each idea Craig Phillips explores the DIY route, working out how much the viewer can do themselves to save money - and which bits they should leave to the professionals

programme.title: Ultimate Police Interceptors
programme.desc: In Bradford, a stolen Ford Ranger hits more than 100mph and is driven on the wrong side of a dual carriageway, before the suspects make a run for it. In a desperate bid to lose the cops, the driver swims across a canal, to no avail. In Co Durham, Sergeant Kev leads a raid of a large cannabis grow, hidden in a town-centre restaurant, and Steve locates a runaway driver in the middle of a pitch-black field, with a little help from the eye in the sky

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Critical care paramedic Pete Edwards and the Midlands Air Ambulance Trauma Team are dispatched to give lifesaving treatment to a 21-year-old motorcyclist who has been thrown off his bike, with his helmet also coming off in the impact. Elsewhere, Rob Davis battles to save the life of an 80-year-old who is in cardiac arrest on his driveway, and the team is called to a man who has collapsed with a suspected heart attack and is showing symptoms of Covid-19

programme.title: Inside Holloway Prison
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary exploring the history of the prison and the crimes of its most notorious inmates, as well as uncovering scandals hidden within its walls. The facility was built in 1852 and initially housed both male and female prisoners. However, in 1902 it became a female-only jail and had a new gallows installed, with its first victims being serial baby killers Amelia Sach and Annie Walters. Suffragettes imprisoned there were treated as common criminals and when some of them began hunger strikes, the regime's response was brutal. The programme ends by taking a look at the prison during the Second World War and up to 1948

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A psychological profile of former nurse Beverly Allitt, who is currently serving 13 life sentences for murdering four children and injuring nine others at Grantham Hospital in Lincolnshire in 1991. Psychologists and criminology experts explore the possible motives for her crimes, examining her behaviour during childhood, when she was known to be an attention seeker

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.desc: Graeme Hall helps to train two dogs that go overboard in protecting the family home and possessions, and another that is particularly protective of the owners' 18-month-old baby. Another candidate for retraining is an energetic cavapoochon who loves to run faster than its owners can handle and does not know to respond to its own name

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian has to deliver the biggest calf he has ever encountered, while Peter has to perform testicular surgery on a show dog that may bring a premature end to his performance career. A Clydesdale horse that recently needed foot surgery now also needs dental treatment - and the specialist equipment Candela uses for treating teeth is too small for the massive animal

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Mrs Pumphrey is convinced her beloved Pekingese is dying. James discovers that she has not been keeping her pampered pet on the strict diet he prescribed, and is forced to take the dog in while it recovers from illness brought about by over indulgence. Tristan prepares to return to university, but needs Siegfried's help to pay for his accommodation. However, his older brother is not prepared to part with a penny until he has proved he is serious about being a vet. James treats the Aldersons' prize bull, and Helen rewards his efforts with some unusual home baking

programme.title: Princess Margaret: Rebel Without a Crown
programme.desc: A profile of the Queen's younger sister, who was determined to live her life exactly as she wanted, even if that sometimes meant bringing the monarchy into disrepute. As a child she was as a mischievous and rebellious princess who loved being the centre of attention, while when she split up with photographer Anthony Armstrong-Jones she became the first major royal to get divorced so since Henry VIII

programme.title: In Therapy
programme.desc: The singer undergoes psychological evaluations with leading UK therapist Mandy Saligari over a number of intensive sessions. Mandy explores every aspect of her past including coming to terms with the death of her sister Bernie, her relationship with her husband and now the reality of living with incurable cancer

programme.title: Premiership Rugby Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Sale Sharks v Harlequins. Action from the final, which came from AJ Bell Stadium. Sale were looking to make home advantage count as they aimed to win their first trophy since they were crowned Premiership champions in 2006, while Quins were hoping to emulate their 2013 triumph in this competition under its previous guise of the Anglo-Welsh Cup

programme.title: House Doctor

programme.title: The Boxtrolls (2014)
programme.desc: The people of a small town live in fear of underground trolls, who they do not realise are actually harmless. A boy raised by the creatures must convince the townsfolk there is nothing to fear when a team of pest exterminators is hired to wipe out the friendly monsters. Stop-motion animated fantasy, with the voices of Isaac Hempstead Wright, Elle Fanning and Ben Kingsley

programme.title: Capture the Flag (2015)
programme.desc: A young surfer and his friends try to prevent a devious plan to change the course of history when a ruthless billionaire sets out to stop the moon landings from happening, so that he can gain control of a valuable energy source. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Sam Fink, Phillipa Alexander and Lorraine Pilkington

programme.title: The Indian in the Cupboard (1995)
programme.desc: A nine-year-old boy is given an old cupboard and a toy Iroquois Indian for his birthday - but when he puts the figure inside the cupboard, he is astonished to see it come to life. He repeats the experiment with more of his toys, and realises he is creating real people - and is responsible for their wellbeing. Children's fantasy, with Hal Scardino, Litefoot and Steve Coogan

programme.title: Kubo and the Two Strings (2016)
programme.desc: A boy unwittingly summons an evil spirit to wreak havoc on his peaceful village home. The only hope of defeating the vengeful creature is to find a magical suit of armour belonging to the boy's father - but finding it will entail matching wits with an assortment of monstrous foes. Animated adventure, with the voices of Charlize Theron, Art Parkinson and Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron

programme.title: All The Money in the World (2017)
programme.desc: When 16-year-old John Paul Getty III is kidnapped in 1973, his devoted mother tries to convince his billionaire grandfather Jean Paul Getty to pay the ransom. Ridley Scott's fact-based drama, starring Michelle Williams, an Oscar-nominated Christopher Plummer, who replaced Kevin Spacey a few weeks before the film was released, and Mark Wahlberg

programme.title: Journeyman (2017)
programme.desc: World middleweight champion Matty Burton is nearing the end of his professional career when he suffers a serious head injury during a fight that leaves him with brain damage. Boxing drama, written, directed by and starring Paddy Considine, with Jodie Whittaker, Paul Popplewell and Tony Pitts

programme.title: Sweet Sixteen (2002)
programme.desc: A boy tries to save his jailbird mother from danger on the streets of a Scottish coastal town, by creating a safe haven where she can escape the grasp of the two men in her life. However, his efforts to raise the necessary funds lead him and his friends into all manner of schemes, and he is soon dangerously out of his depth. Ken Loach's drama, starring Martin Compston, Annmarie Fulton, William Ruane, Michelle Coulter and Gary McCormack

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: The inside story of the characters and narrative of HERE/NOT HERE, the deaf hip hop music drama

programme.title: The Spy in Black (1939)
programme.desc: A German spy falls for an apparently sympathetic schoolteacher during a First World War mission, unaware the object of his affections is in fact an English double agent, a situation that threatens to jeopardise an operation to destroy the British fleet in the Orkneys in 1917. Powell and Pressburger's romantic drama, starring Conrad Veidt, Valerie Hobson and Marius Goring

programme.title: The Last Frontier (1955)
programme.desc: A backwoods trapper signs up as a cavalry scout at a fort manned by inexperienced soldiers, where he falls in love with a colonel's wife. On taking over command of the garrison, the officer plans to lead his men in a reckless attack on a hostile Indian tribe - and it is down to the frontiersman to save his comrades from a massacre. Western, starring Victor Mature, Robert Preston and Anne Bancroft

programme.title: The Enemy Below (1957)
programme.desc: The captain of an American destroyer in the South Atlantic is still recovering from the sinking of his previous vessel. He tries to outwit a cunning German U-boat commander, but comes to respect the courage of his enemy. However, his crew fears he is not up to the challenge of defeating his opponent. Second World War thriller, starring Robert Mitchum, Curt Jurgens, Theodore Bikel and David Hedison

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: The desperate relatives of people captured by Comanches many years before put pressure on the US military to bring them home. The army hires a cynical frontier marshal, who agrees to negotiate their release in return for a commission. But the townsfolk are forced to face some grim truths when he returns with just one unrecognisable captive. John Ford's Western, with James Stewart, Richard Widmark and Shirley Jones

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin (2011)
programme.desc: A reporter's purchase of a model ship brings him under threat from a ruthless criminal, as it is one of a series of clues to the location of the real vessel, which holds a pirate's lost treasure. He sets off on a globetrotting quest to find it, assisted by a drunken sea captain, two bumbling detectives and his faithful dog. Steven Spielberg's animated adventure based on Herge's comic-strip series, with the voices of Jamie Bell, Andy Serkis and Daniel Craig

programme.title: Passengers (2016)
programme.desc: A spacecraft transporting thousands of people to a distant planet malfunctions. As woken travelling companions Jim Preston and Aurora Lane fall in love, they are soon on a collision course with more technical problems and a dark secret. Fantasy adventure, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Chris Pratt and Michael Sheen

programme.title: Wild Honey Pie! (2018)
programme.desc: Gillian, an aspiring writer and her DJ husband Oliver attempt to recover when their marriage hits perhaps the first pothole before the proverbial rut. But then interest in Gillian's first play kicks off a series of encounters that could provide all the spice and complexity any marriage could want. Writer/director Jamie Adams' comedy drama, starring Jemima Kirke, Richard Elis and Sarah Solemani

programme.title: Labor Day (2013)
programme.desc: A 13-year-old boy is forced to grow up fast as he helps his reclusive single mother cope with depression. They encounter a mysterious stranger who is in distress and offer to take him home - only to discover he is an escaped convict and the subject of a police manhunt. Drama based on Joyce Maynard's novel, starring Kate Winslet and Josh Brolin

programme.title: How Green Was My Valley (1941)
programme.desc: Residents of a Welsh mining community at the start of the 20th century struggle to come to terms with the decline in their traditional way of life. Oscar-winning drama, starring Walter Pidgeon, Maureen O'Hara, Donald Crisp and Roddy McDowall

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone (1958)
programme.desc: A drifter rides into a town dominated by the members of a ruthless family. He befriends a Mexican in jail for killing a man who attacked his sister and tries to save him from the gallows, getting caught up in the evil clan's running internal conflicts in the process. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Craig Stevens, Manuel Rojas and Barry Kelley

programme.title: The Long Memory (1952)
programme.desc: A man is released from prison after serving a 12-year sentence for a crime he did not commit, and immediately sets about tracking down three witnesses who lied in court, bringing about his conviction. However, while seeking revenge, he discovers the case is more complicated than expected. Thriller, starring John Mills, Elizabeth Sellars, John McCallum and Geoffrey Keen

programme.title: Man in the Saddle (1951)
programme.desc: A wealthy and ambitious cattleman plans to seize all the land surrounding his own. A peaceful rancher living nearby ignores warnings to sell up and avoid a conflict, and as he suffers a campaign of intimidation, he is forced to adopt violent methods to defend his livelihood. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Alexander Knox, Joan Leslie and Ellen Drew

programme.title: Transcendence (2014)
programme.desc: A scientist working to develop artificial intelligence is assassinated, but his death provides the breakthrough he and his colleagues needed, as his own mind is uploaded into a computer system. Granted extraordinary knowledge, he begins planning to change the world for the better - with potentially horrific consequences for the human race. Sci-fi drama, starring Johnny Depp, Rebecca Hall and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets (2017)
programme.desc: When a dark force threatens a vast metropolis, special operatives Valerian and Laureline must race to identify the menace and protect the future of the universe. Luc Besson's epic sci-fi adventure, starring Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne and Clive Owen

programme.title: Along Came a Spider (2001)
programme.desc: A police forensic psychologist searches for the daughter of a senator, who has been kidnapped from her expensive private school by a media-obsessed teacher, sparking a desperate race to hunt down her psychotic and devilishly intelligent captor before it is too late. Thriller prequel to Kiss the Girls, starring Morgan Freeman, Monica Potter, Michael Wincott, Dylan Baker and Penelope Ann Miller

programme.title: Leaning into the Wind (2017)
programme.desc: Thomas Riedelsheimer's documentary following artist Andy Goldsworthy as he creates works that mediate, disrupt or commune with the environment

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Jack plans a haunting, horror-themed wedding, while his bride-to-be Becka dreams of a traditional Scottish affair. As Jack recruits the Grim Reaper and covers Becka's wedding dress in fake blood, he hopes his eerie marital concept will prove a screaming success and not a fright night disaster

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost visits Hawaii to give advice to Heather and Todd, whose triplets have grown into wild screaming toddlers and they became polarised in the way to deal with them

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: The subservient wife of a biker who believes men should be waited on hand and foot swaps lives with a progressive social media influencer, whose husband takes care of the kids

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after he sees the movie Spaceballs, but Jackie mistakes his club advertisement for political satire and puts it in the school paper. When Beverly and Pops come up for parents' weekend at college, Erica plans to tell them about an important decision she has made, but Murray surprises everyone by tagging along

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lainey moves back to town and Barry invites her to the prom, but when she refuses, he plans a prank with Principal Ball's car to get out of going. Erica tells Murray she has made a final decision about her future at college, but he is so furious that he insists she pay her own way for rent and food

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Adam celebrates his 16th birthday, his parents are too distracted by Barry and Lainey's engagement and Erica's band ambitions to acknowledge their youngest son's big day. However, the situation presents an opportunity for Adam to ask Erica to put him on the high school social map. Meanwhile, Beverly thinks she can scare Barry and Lainey straight with the reality of being adults

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's girlfriend Jackie returns after spending the summer in New York and seems like a different person. After receiving some bad advice from his loved ones, Adam takes drastic measures to hold on to his relationship. Beverly is not happy with Lainey's domestic skills and decides to teach her future daughter-in-law a thing or two about family catering

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta takes part in an undercover FBI operation that ends in a mass arrest. But when one of the mobsters escapes he enlists Boyle's help in tracking him down. Captain Holt tests the squad's patience with practice drills in which Sgt Jeffords plays different roles, while Gina pleads with Boyle to keep a secret. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt is taken by surprise when his long-time nemesis, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch (guest star Kyra Sedgwick), arrives to carry out an inspection of his precinct. Peralta and Jeffords test the boundaries between 'work friendship' and 'real friendship' while they investigate a stabbing at a trendy milk bar. Boyle searches for a guest to take to his ex-wife's engagement party - will Diaz come to the rescue?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends struggle through an awkward morning after Sheldon's mother and Leonard's father share an evening together. Penny's family arrives in town to attend Penny and Leonard's second wedding ceremony. Keith Carradine, Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the Air Force Department of Material Command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette decide they do not want to know the gender of their unborn child, but are upset when they hear Raj has found out before they have. After Amy's apartment floods, she proposes a cohabitation experiment with Sheldon to stay with him while her apartment undergoes repairs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Things don't run smoothly as Amy and Sheldon's cohabitation experiment continues, forcing Leonard and Penny to intervene when the couple have an argument about the 'bathroom schedule'. Howard and Bernadette cancel their holiday plans when Bernadette feels unwell and decide to have a secret stay-cation at home instead. However, the pair are soon disturbed by unexpected guests dropping by

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War (2016)
programme.desc: Eric and fellow warrior Sara, raised as members of ice Queen Freya's army, try to conceal their forbidden love as they fight to survive the wicked intentions of both Freya and her sister Ravenna. However, as war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara unite with Freya in an attempt to end Ravenna's wicked reign once and for all. Fantasy adventure, starring Chris Hemsworth, Charlize Theron, Emily Blunt and Jessica Chastain

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: First Dates

Devout Christian Tawanda gets to know Marvin, a Trevor Nelson doppelganger, while Essex girl Sian is on the hunt for her dream man - and Londoner Tom ticks all the right boxes. There's a linguistic battle of wits between Irish fashionista Laura and her date Frankie, with explosive results, and confident Charlie hopes to right his previous relationship wrongs as he meets one-time ballet dancer Nelly

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Jack plans a haunting, horror-themed wedding, while his bride-to-be Becka dreams of a traditional Scottish affair. As Jack recruits the Grim Reaper and covers Becka's wedding dress in fake blood, he hopes his eerie marital concept will prove a screaming success and not a fright night disaster

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon falls ill, and his friends decide to go to a Planet of the Apes movie marathon to keep their distance, knowing he will be in a terrible mood. However, an unsuspecting Penny offers to nurse him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels threatened by a 15-year-old physics prodigy who is even cleverer than he is, and asks Leonard to help him discredit the precocious teenager's research. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a BMW 2002 Turbo for a man who has owned it for 30 years, but has been unable to maintain it due to ill health

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to south Wales to rescue a Vauxhall Astra GTE for ex-boy racer Huw. Tim turns to 21st-century science to create the GTE's irreplaceable hubcaps, while Fuzz sticks to what he knows best by rebuilding the high-performance engine. With the car finally ready, the result is revealed to a shocked Huw via a crafty and complicated set-up

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Eastbourne on the south coast to restore a 1962 Mini Cooper. This particular model is the property of farmer Keith, who has raced and rallied cars for most of his life, until being struck down with serious heart problems. Although his racing days are now over, Keith cannot let go of his beloved Mini, even though it has been rotting away in a shed for years

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Worcestershire, where friends Geri Atterbury and Lorraine Rigby invite guests to stay at Greenways of Malvern. On arrival, couple Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are not impressed by the wild wallpaper, and the lack of an en-suite dismays mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Royal Forester at Bewdley in Worcestershire for their second stay, with proprietors Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker hoping to impress their guests with a trip to a local safari park. Sarah and Luke are impressed with their colourful room, but Sanjeev and Elinor have a 'hairy' experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From Ferry Lodge in Holyhead, Anglesey, where mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway hope to impress the other contestants. However, things do not get off to a good start when Geri and Lorraine are overwhelmed by the number of laminated signs, Sean and Maxine begrudge paying 50p for toiletries and Sanjeev and Elinor are left unimpressed by the cleanliness of the establishment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Partners Sanjeev Bhagotra and Elinor Roberts welcome their guests to Court Colman Manor, Bridgend, Glamorgan. Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are pleased with the size of their room on arrival, but Sarah Allaway discovers a collection of cobwebs in hers. During the afternoon, the groups take a lesson in fire-making, and the next morning a traditional Welsh breakfast is not to everyone's taste - with the hosts wondering whether tactical voting has played a part come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet one last time to find out what they have been paid. Geri kicks off proceedings by demanding to know why Sarah and Luke did not want a return visit to Greenways of Malvern, before they in turn confront Sanjeev and Elinor over their low cleanliness score for Ferry Lodge. Then the Court Colman Manor proprietors accuse Sarah and Luke of unfairly judging their hotel, before the payments are revealed and the winners are announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Alarm-company owner Bill Black kicks off a series of dinner parties in Dundee, where he hopes his belt-busting menu will impress his guests - proud Arbroathian Phil Petrie, English student Hannah Wilson, ferret fancier Alex Pithouse and 28-year-old Kim Gillespie - and make him an early contender for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Architectural technician Alex Pithouse hosts the second dinner party in Dundee, and aims to impress his guests by giving them an education in fine dining, complete with a complex menu and some good wines, as well as by introducing them to his three pet ferrets

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vegetarian Hannah Wilson prepares an Italian feast for her guests in Dundee, and in a bid to win over her carnivore guests she devises a cunning plan that involves dishing up some meat with the starter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth night in Dundee is hosted by self-styled food critic Phil Petrie, who has been unimpressed with the culinary standard so far. He hopes to impress with his evening, but things begin to go wrong when he runs out of ingredients and leaves his guests feeling hungry

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Dundee, Kim Gillespie plans an ambitious menu, largely based on Yorkshire delights, with exotic dishes from Spain and Thailand also featuring - all accompanied by a Scottish choir singing American songs

programme.title: The 100 Greatest Musicals
programme.desc: Denise Van Outen concludes the rundown of viewers' favourite musicals, counting down from 50 to number one. Featuring interviews with stars including Scott Baio (Bugsy Malone), Lee Curreri (Fame), Ron Moody (Oliver!) and Susan Sarandon (The Rocky Horror Picture Show), as well as directors, writers and producers including Randal Kleiser (Grease), Rob Marshall (Chicago), Alan Parker (Evita, Fame and Bugsy Malone) and Cameron Mackintosh and Willy Russell (Blood Brothers). Plus, Omar Sharif, Elaine Paige, Michael Ball, Claire Sweeney, Jonathan Wilkes and Miss Piggy are among the contributors who reveal the impact these musicals have had on their lives

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Tim and Philomena O'Donovan, who are trying to convert the old lifeboat station in Tenby, Pembrokeshire, into a contemporary home and preserve the historic building for posterity. A weather-worn, rusting and rotting hulk that was never designed for habitation, it is perched on a steel pier 40ft above the sea and can only be reached by crossing the sandy beach at low tide

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In the Lakes, there's a dramatic mountain rescue for injured climber Richard after a fall of 600 feet. A night on Hart Crag for four campers is called short in the face of huge winds blowing up. And in the Cairngorms, new team member Emma joins a dangerous search for lost walkers

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary following the emergency services in Wiltshire, focusing on car crimes committed by young drivers. PC Nick Denning is dispatched in pursuit of a 'pool car' - a cheap, unregistered car shared by several friends - which is currently being driven at breakneck speed around residential streets. Other officers pursue suspected joyriders, and are shocked to find the driver is only 14

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Eleven-month-old Isabel is rushed to St George's after suffering a seizure and losing consciousness, while 22-year-old Felix is brought to A&E with a self-inflicted stab wound to his stomach. Retired engineer Bill, 68, fell 15ft from a ladder while cutting a leylandii hedge. He arrives by air ambulance with breathing difficulties and suspected multiple fractures

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that they're failing to save their father's Italian restaurant Levanti's from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In the Lakes, there's a dramatic mountain rescue for injured climber Richard after a fall of 600 feet. A night on Hart Crag for four campers is called short in the face of huge winds blowing up. And in the Cairngorms, new team member Emma joins a dangerous search for lost walkers

PC Nick Denning is dispatched in pursuit of a 'pool car' - a cheap, unregistered car shared by several friends - which is currently being driven at breakneck speed around residential streets. Other officers pursue suspected joyriders, and are shocked to find the driver is only 14

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Clare Grogan guest stars as a feminist protest singer who visits Craggy Island and talks gormless Dougal into giving her the parochial house while Ted is out judging a local beauty contest. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
