programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits the world's largest jelly bean producers to discover what they are made of instead of gelatine, and Matt Tebbutt finds out why maple syrup is so expensive

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman and Laura Hamilton show Bev and Gary D'Cruz homes in the Cotswolds and Lanzarote, with a budget of £600,000 for the UK and £400,000 for the island in the Canaries

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien repurposes an old butcher's block into a coffee table, while Henry Cole restores a pair of go-karts to race against restorer Guy

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole refurbishes a classic Ford Mustang and a neon garage sign, while Simon O'Brien restores a classic Chopper bicycle and turns a bass guitar into a chair

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie has a month to convert her old stable into a studio for the launch of her art weekends, but when she doesn't see eye to eye with mother Isobel about the design, renovations could take longer than anticipated. Belinda's promised a heated outdoor swimming pool on the chateau's website, so Lee starts constructing a solar panel system. Dick saves cash by getting creative on a new lighting project for Angel's treasury

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Gavin Panella and Chantal Schaul are self-building a little bit of continental Europe in the heart of Norfolk. Chantal's from Luxembourg, where self-building is much more common. They've opted for a fixed-price kit, but also want to add plenty of personal touches, so the costs are racking up. What is more, they're building in a challenging plot, which calls for some imaginative design features. It's going to be one of the most colourful homes that Charlie Luxton has ever seen and he has lots of suggestions to help them realise their bright ideas

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Ye Olde Fighting Cocks in Arnside, Cumbria, where owners Tony Keates and Jeanette Hamer hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money. However, while the B&B's guests are bowled over by the spectacular views, they are less than impressed by Tony's tales of business success and a mouldy mattress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Hadleigh, Suffolk, where Dr Stephen Stanley-Little invites fellow B&B owners to come and stay at his tranquil country setting - Westward Cottage. He takes his guests on a historic village tour that leaves one couple plotting their escape, while the host's relaxed approach to breakfast drives some of the others mad

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third to host are bohemian couple Avril Berry and Alan Fraser of Roulotte Retreat in Melrose in the Scottish Borders. Their unique gypsy caravans are not to everyone's liking, and a yoga class fails to calm the tensions that seem to be rising within the group

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Elgin Hotel, Blackpool, where manager Garry Lloyd and his daughter Sophie Seddon want to demonstrate how their 89-room business can still deliver a personal touch. The hosts arrange an afternoon of tap-dancing lessons, ending with a surprise performance at the iconic Grand Theatre, but a breakfast mix-up the following morning puts some of the guests nonplussed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the week reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the B&B owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Flamingo chick Marley faces a tough childhood when mother Calypso loses interest in her duties - leaving dad Rum to do the work of two parents. The keepers are concerned when a newborn onager foal takes a turn for the worse, and a Sulawesi macaque monkey Rumple gives birth to a baby called Rey, only for the baby to get bullied by some of the higher-ranking females

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit the Payne-Durkins, on the rural outskirts of Leeds, to help Karl and Paul decide whether to renovate or sell their three bed home. Karl loves the unique design and idyllic location, but Paul thinks they are too isolated, and would rather move to another area than spend the moving improving their current home

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul move into their new home in western France, but struggle with the language, while Adam from Warwickshire is hoping to join the band of expat chateau owners

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets estate manager Ed Waghorn and his wife Rowena, a couple living an almost self-sufficient life with their four children on a smallholding in Herefordshire. They have been constructing a timber-framed house using recycled materials, wood from nearby forests and stone from around the site, but as construction becomes a way of life for Ed, they seem to have lost sight of their goal

programme.title: Inside the Zoo: Down Under
programme.desc: A mysterious virus threatens to wipe out an entire species of snapping turtles, and an injured Fiordland crested penguin arrives from Melbourne Zoo. Narrated by Naomi Watts

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Roisin Conaty taking on guest captain Alan Carr and Joe Lycett. Susie Dent is joined by Spencer Jones in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priest makes a valiant effort to give up cigarettes for Lent, inspired by a challenge from Dick Byrne, his opposite number over on Rugged Island, but soon finds he is not cut out for a life of self-denial. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Father Jack is hauled off to the local old priests' home to be treated for a strange medical complaint. He is replaced by a younger man - who proceeds to drive everyone crazy by playing jungle music at ear-splitting volume for hours on end. Dermot Morgan and Frank Kelly star

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room in Monrovia, California, and within minutes of his arrival, is caught in the crossfire of an argument between the owner, his wife and their children, all of whom are feeling the pressure of working seven days a week. Can the chef save the business and mend the warring family's frayed relationships?

programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Mauritius to find out what the difference is between white and dark rum, and learns the explosive origins of the term proof

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman and Jonnie Irwin show Hertfordshire couple Phil and Geraldine properties in Devon and Bergerac, with a UK budget of £375,000 and £275,000 for France

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Nantwich and Stoke-on-Trent, where Henry comes across a 1960s moped, and Simon restores an early Mirror Dinghy

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores a petrol pump and turns a hubcap into a clock, and Simon O'Brien repurposes a copper immersion heater into a stylish wash basin

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul move into their new home in western France, but struggle with the language, while Adam from Warwickshire is hoping to join the band of expat chateau owners

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Herefordshire to meet couple Tim and Fliss, who have been fighting to get planning permission for their new home for three years while living in a static caravan, and hope to save £70,000 through a self-built, timber-framed house when they get the go-ahead to start work on a small plot of family land

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Shelley Guest House in Aberystwyth, where its husband-and-wife owners hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money by providing their guests with an old-school form of entertainment, some Spanish cuisine and a monumental continental breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests travel to the five-star Ixworth House in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, where hosts John and Sharyn Snell are quietly confident their establishment will impress. John reveals his hidden talents at dinner, but his performance at breakfast the next morning does not go down well with all of the fellow B&B owners

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: In York, part-time panto dame Graham Smith runs the Georgian House & Mews, and takes his guests back in time with a Nordic test of strength. At supper, Hazel has romance on her mind, but the guests are left to fend for themselves at breakfast - until Graham makes a show-stopping appearance

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the George Hotel in Orton, Cumbria, for the fourth visit of the day. Owner Hazel McAleese organises a fishing trip as the afternoon activity, during which one of the guests decides to use the opportunity to give everyone a lesson in innuendo

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the contest reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the B&B owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Two of the young Asian elephants contract the herpes virus, leaving the keepers doing everything they can to save the animals' lives, using anti-viral medication and a pioneering blood transfusion. When silvery gibbon Tilu gives birth, dad Alven has to keep their older son, tearaway Eko, in check. The keepers wonder why jaguars Napo and Goshi have not mated after six years together, and a new species of cricket arrives at the insect house

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil Spencer and Kirstie Allsopp meet the Pogsons in Harrogate, North Yorkshire and offer advice to the family who are unsure whether to renovate their property or find a new home. After living in their three-bedroom house for 16 years, Carol thinks that it is time for a big change, but Andrew is adamant he is not moving house

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul start transforming their abandoned scullery into a kitchen. Meanwhile, Adam goes for a second viewing at a property on the slopes of the Pyrenees

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Stonemason Adam Purchase and his partner Nicola Brennan try to restore a dilapidated Grade II-listed silver-mine engine-house in Cornwall. With a budget of £100,000, Adam takes a year off work to transform the property into a new home, but has to rely on favours to complete the project before he runs out of time

programme.title: Lost Pyramids of the Aztecs
programme.desc: Archaeologists investigate the discovery of more than 100 ancient skeletons buried in a hillside outside Mexico City. They also attempt to decode the secrets of a mysterious ancient manuscript to reveal the secrets of Aztec ritual sacrifice, and finally manage to complete their groundbreaking experiment to build a replica Aztec pyramid

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Peter, 85, has been brought - unwillingly - to A&E by his stepson Brian. He cut his finger on some wire two weeks earlier and his hand is swollen and won't stop bleeding. Emma, 23, is rushed to St George's after crashing her car on the way to her father's house, while doctors also see to 86-year-old Harry, who fell down a flight of stairs a day earlier but didn't seek treatment. Ciaran, 27, injured his ankle the previous night while out with friends and was given a temporary cast. Emergency nurse practitioner Helen needs to get him X-rayed and replastered, but he faces a return visit for an operation

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A crew battles bad weather in Cumbria to reach injured 70-year-old hill-walker Jenny, while Scott's attempts at DIY land him in serious trouble, and biker Ronald needs urgent treatment after a crash

programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with team captain Sean Lock and Johnny Vegas taking on guest captain Alan Carr and Lou Sanders. programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef heads to the north-eastern Greek city of Thessaloniki, which nestles on the northern shores of the Aegean Sea. The city is revered as the gourmet capital of Greece and birthplace to possibly the greatest warrior general that ever lived - Alexander. Rick explores a city of many identities, boasting a young student population apparently hungry for dishes that reflect the freshest of seafood. Back home, he prepares veal and aubergine stew after meeting the doyenne of Greek cooking, Vafa Alexiadou

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: The steep streets of Cincinnati's Mount Adams neighbourhood play host to the crazy cart designs, 40,000 people going wild and plenty of crashes

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May take three lightweight supercars across Europe in search of the continent's best roads, and Jeremy looks at Volkswagen's decision to put a Bentley engine in the Golf. Helen Mirren is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys get their fill of petroliana at a pick in Vermont, and Frank and Dave head to Florida in search of a super-rare cycle car

programme.title: Drug Wars
programme.desc: The police in Manila begin a new tactic where they lure dealers and traffickers right into their hands, with informants setting the bait before the cops move in for the bust

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Offbeat tourism show in which Richard Ayoade is joined by celebrity guests to enjoy the most efficient weekend break possible. He begins in Barcelona with comedienne and actress Kathy Burke, experiencing the best of this popular holiday destination in just 48 hours. The pair sample adventurous cuisine, including potatoes coated in edible clay, and a cava tasting session quickly descends into disarray. Other highlights include a visit to the Barcelona Football Club museum, a guided tricycle tour, and a trip to see the surrealist work of Catalan artist Joan Miro

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by fellow comedian Adam Hills on a whirlwind weekend in Turkey's largest city. He wants to show The Last Leg host how to holiday with ruthless efficiency, as they cross the River Bosphorus from Europe to Asia, comparing a private yacht tour with the low-price public ferry. The pair have an authentic Turkish shave at a local barbershop that turns out to be a lot closer than they were expecting, and share an awkward moment at a local bath and massage parlour. There's also a visit to the Grand Bazaar market, where both men have a go at haggling

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson test-drives two estate cars - the BMW M5 and Mercedes E63. Richard Hammond tries out motor-home racing, while James May pits an Alfa Romeo 159 against a man who crosses the Humber estuary without using its famous bridge. The Stig puts Honda's Civic Type R through its paces and former England rugby union forward Lawrence Dallaglio is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef embarks on a culinary journey by sea and land to explore the Far East's most diverse food cultures. He begins in Cambodia, where tourists are beginning to return after the fall of the Khmer Rouge regime. As well as discovering the joys of freshly caught swimmer crabs with green peppercorns, he learns how to cook the country's most famous dish - fish amok - and samples lok lak, made with marinated beef. He also visits the Angkor Wat temple and joins a rice barge to travel down the Mekong River

programme.title: Top Gear

As usual, all participants will be hoping to deceive one another with plausible lies, such as Richard stating he has never seen Breaking Bad because of his Homes Under the Hammer addiction, Sir Tom claiming he enjoys whiskey on his Christmas morning cornflakes, and Chris explaining that his full name is actually Christmas Kamara. The team also presents a somewhat unusual take on the Nativity

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo journeys from Stroud to Bath, investigating the Victorian origins of snooker, before ploughing a crooked furrow at the Royal Agricultural College in Cirencester. At his final destination in Bath, he takes tea with the ladies, and also discovers a scandalous novel written by an eccentric recluse, who was once the wealthiest man in England

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second programme this year from RAF Coningsby in Lincolnshire, and discovers the story of a length of tree that ended up inside a Lancaster bomber. programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The remarkable story of how Stalin's massive war factories were dismantled and moved east on one and half million railway trucks, to avoid being lost to the Nazis

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Bristol to Glastonbury, entering the foul-smelling world of a Victorian tannery and hearing how a 19th-century entrepreneur made his fortune thanks to mountains of bird droppings, using his wealth to build churches and one of the most luxurious country houses in Britain. When he reaches his destination, Michael heads for the mystical Glastonbury Abbey, where Victorian tourists flocked to hear tales of King Arthur and the Holy Grail

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Referring to his trusty Bradshaw's Guidebook, Michael Portillo stands trial at the Bloody Assizes in Taunton, Somerset, and feels the full force of the law. He also gets to grips with a miracle of Victorian engineering on the Somerset Levels at Westonzoyland, and on Dartmoor embarks on a mid-19th century treasure hunt still popular today

programme.title: Trains That Changed the World
programme.desc: The historical importance of freight trains, including four-mile long vehicles transporting enough iron ore to build two Eiffel towers

programme.title: Steam Train Britain
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of three preserved steam railway lines - the South Devon Railway heritage line, the Ffestiniog and Welsh Highlands Railway and the Great Central Railway. programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: After many years of hard work, Debbie and Nick from Salford believe the time is right to buy a holiday home close to the traditional Spanish town of Dénia on the Costa Blanca. Spectacular views at the top of the couple's wish list, so armed with a budget of £150,000, Laura Hamilton sets out to line up five options for them to consider

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppi's in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgia's constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons hoping to pair up over dinner include healthcare assistant Anthony, who wants to put his wild past behind him. Is speech therapist Lawrence 'the one'? Wedding singer Georgina has a blind date with property developer Adam, who prides himself on knowing how to treat a woman, while receptionist Bev sits down with former bank manager Howard, who is strangely familiar

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Essex-based photographer Chris, haulage guy Lou, shopping centre manager Adam, analytics manager Kris and oven cleaning technician Michael move in with Tara, a 32-year-old business consultant from Halifax in West Yorkshire, each hoping to win her affections. Nearly all of Tara's friends are married, and just about the most serious relationship she had to date has been with Kaiser - her beloved German shepherd. Top of Tara's list of requirements is a man who can make her laugh. Eventually, five become one - will Tara make the right choice?

programme.title: Lodgers for Codgers
programme.desc: With the majority of people under 30 struggling to get on the property ladder, and millions of over-sixties sitting on empty rooms, young and old are tackling Britain's housing crisis by trialling a unique solution - moving in together. This time, Cairo, who was homeless for several years, leaves his temporary accommodation to stay with 66-year-old in-line skater Bonnie, based in Kensington and Chelsea. Meanwhile, Lucy moves in with Viv and Merv in Norfolk, as the 25-year-old tests out lodging as an alternative to living in a camper van

programme.title: Call the Cops
programme.desc: An inexperienced officer ends up in a dangerous high-speed car chase on only his third day on active duty, and then has to deal with an unprovoked attack on an elderly man in a supermarket car park. A former soldier, who lost his leg while serving in Afghanistan, finds policing Exeter a far more relaxing line of work - but a pub brawl tests even his battle-hardened resilience to the limits. Another new recruit has to deal with a gang of marauding football fans who have just knocked out a total strange

programme.title: Lost at Sea: My Dad's Last Journey
programme.desc: Following Louis Bird's journey to piece together the life of his father, Peter Bird, after he disappeared on a voyage at sea in 1996. In 1983, Peter Bird was the first person to row the Pacific Ocean single-handed. Crossing 8,000 treacherous miles in a row-boat, turned Peter into an international legend. On a 1996 voyage, he disappeared, and his empty boat was recovered with a film camera still attached, but he was never found. This programme follows Louis on a personal journey to understand his father, as he and his mother come to terms with feelings of loss and abandonment

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third to host this week is manager James Hall and owner's son Adam Neale of The Black Swan in Horsham St Faith, a luxury-roomed establishment with onsite restaurant and pub

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Delamere Farm near Peterborough, where proud owner Agi Chapman is sent into a spin after hearing some critical comments over breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day arrives, and the hosts of The White Horse Inn, Barnfield B&B, The Black Swan Inn and Delamere Farm all discover just how much their guests valued their services

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barber Kenny Flynn hosts the first dinner party in Liverpool. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Multiple business owner Rob Spicer welcomes the diners to his home for the second party in Liverpool. He is convinced his 'historical leader' theme will be a hit, but there is a shock in store as one of the guests reveals a secret about herself

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Model and barrister Cynthia Umezulike hosts the third dinner party in Liverpool, and hopes her meal including tribal fish, a traditional Nigerian jeloff and an exotic fruit platter will impress her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rock music enthusiast Glen Simpson hosts the fourth dinner party in Liverpool. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jilly Pollock hosts the fifth and final party in Liverpool, inviting her fellow contestants to a black-tie event. Ben Hillman sets out to find them their perfect home on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra invites her divorced parents to Thanksgiving dinner, and Raymond sees something shocking that convinces him they are getting back together. The truth, however, proves far stranger. Robert Culp and Katherine Helmond guest star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is annoyed to discover Marie is plying his brother with gifts of scented candles and massage oils. However, his mood changes when he deduces her real motive - to put Robert in a romantic mood, in the hope he will provide her with grandchildren

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: A special programme celebrating the show's 20th anniversary, as Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back over two decades of house-hunting together. In this episode, Kirstie and Phil recall times they helped house-hunters who were more focused on the gardens rather than the houses themselves. Architect Sam seeks a renovation project, while wife Becky wants a large garden so she can grow and sell flowers. Elsewhere, keen gardener Liz and John are in rented accommodation, so have limited scope and long for their own sprawling green, outdoor space

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: In Devon, George visits one of the National Trust's quirkiest buildings, a bear hut on the 6400-acre Killerton estate. The main house was given away because of the socialist ideals of the aristocratic family who lived there. George unearths secrets and scandal at Baddesley Clinton Hall, a fortified Tudor manor house in Warwickshire where in the past the architecture has meant the difference between life and death, then heads home to the north-east for a walk through Gibside Estate, a landscape park with royal connections and crowned with jaw-dropping architecture

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's armchair critics share more of their critiques of the week's biggest and best shows. They've been watching Who Wants To Be A Millionaire?, (Un)well, Extinction: The Facts, Des, The Third Day, BBC News on the R number, and Breakfast with Michael Gove on Brexit

programme.title: Council House Britain
programme.desc: The work of council workers in Southwark, south London, one of the biggest housing associations in the country. The officers tackle fly-tipping, including 40 tons of rubbish dumped on council land that had been cleared for building new homes. An ageing estate is planned for demolition, meaning 10,000 residents are moving - but it's a sad day for many, including a couple leaving their family home of 50 years. And hoarding manager Laurna helps a scholar whose thousands of books have overtaken his home

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Essex-based photographer Chris, haulage guy Lou, shopping centre manager Adam, analytics manager Kris and oven cleaning technician Michael move in with Tara, a 32-year-old business consultant from Halifax in West Yorkshire, each hoping to win her affections. Top of Tara's list of requirements is a man who can make her laugh. Eventually, five become one - will Tara make the right choice?

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Sergeant David 'Podders' Podmore is called out to investigate after a shooting in the Liverpool area, and following a raid at a property, a number of weapons are seized, including a potential improvised explosive device made out of industrial fireworks. Meanwhile, Sam Jones and Matt Coogan head to the scene of a mortar bomb discovery, while Sergeant Alex 'Swansea' Hughes is called to Llandudno, where a magnet fisherman has taken a mortar that he's found to work

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: Beneath vast mountains and across open moorlands, Scotland's railways connect coastal towns and rural villages through a Highland landscape voted the world's most beautiful railway. This programme meets the people who work on the railway and the steam enthusiasts who safeguard these iconic routes, offering a glimpse into a diverse community united by a passion for the nation's railways

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Farhalls in Windsor, who are unsure whether to sell their four-bed detached house or transform the layout of their home. Graham loves living in Windsor, but Nardeth is growing tired of their cramped and dated house, and would prefer to look for a new property they could purchase

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A 10-month-old puppy called Albie is knocked over by a car on a family camping holiday is rushed in as an emergency admission, and Noel Fitzpatrick fears this may be a life or death situation. Elsewhere, a Scottish terrier has a mysterious ailment, and a 16-month-old spaniel, is suffering from severe arthritis affecting both hips

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal trainer Eve Booth hosts the first dinner party in Co Durham and Wearside, expressing concern that her starter of haggis and black pudding may not be to everyone's taste. Although her main course gets a lukewarm reception, the biggest threat to the evening seems to be fellow contestant Ken Brown's taste in jokes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Interior designer and gypsy wedding supplier Paula Thompson hosts the second party in Co Durham and Wearside, and hopes to bring a touch of class to the proceedings with her 'black and bling' themed event. The evening's menu includes fresh lobster and hairy prawns, accompanied by a spot of belly dancing

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old languages student Donal Anand-Shaw hosts the third dinner party in Co Durham and Wearside, and decides to make the event black tie. He also arranges for a string quartet to play, and serves up a locally-sourced scallop starter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Debt collector Eleri Watson hosts the fourth dinner party in Co Durham and Wearside. However, her efforts to organise an all-Welsh evening do not go according to plan when soil is found in the leek soup and lamb is served burned, dampening the guests' enthusiasm

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businessman Ken Brown hosts the final dinner party in Co Durham and Wearside, and hopes to entertain his guests with a 'wear a wig' themed evening. After annoying his fellow contestants over the past week, he hopes to make amends with his unique entertainment, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Ravin and Pritti from Surrey find a new permanent home for themselves and their family in Gran Canaria, lining up five options within their budget of £180,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ben and Kelly Jukes have been saving up for a holiday home on the Costa Blanca since they got married five years ago. With their first baby on the way, they want somewhere where they can soak up the Spanish sun on holidays and that they can share with family and friends. Scarlette Douglas tempts them with five properties in and around Torrevieja for their budget of £55,000

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Barnfield B&B in St Osyth, Essex, run by Christine and Paul, where as well as offering rooms, Christine also runs spiritual retreats

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in East Sussex and Hertfordshire, with finds that include a Victorian egg incubator

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's brother Peter turns to Ray for advice on talking to women, while Debra decides to help out by throwing a party and inviting all her single friends

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra nags Raymond to tidy up after himself, but he is more concerned with a letter he has received from his sporting hero - which accidentally ends up in the bin

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In this revisit episode, chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Mojito, the Junction (formerly known as Flamangos) and Bazzini to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppi's in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgia's constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin goes house hunting in and around the Spanish town of Chiclana de la Frontera on the Costa de la Luz with Steve and Janice

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a couple with £100,000 to spend to relocate to the Charente in western France, where they hope to lead a more relaxed life in the countryside

programme.title: Egypt's Lost Pyramid
programme.desc: Documentary following archaeologists working on a 4,000-year-old pyramid containing a burial chamber, still apparently sealed. As light enters the tomb for the first time, the artefacts contained within reveal a gripping detective story as although there are no signs of entry, the contents have been disturbed. To solve the mystery, Egyptologists explore the nearby Black Pyramid to see how pyramid builders used every trick in the book to protect the treasures, discovering a dark and complex labyrinth of dummy tombs, false passages and stone portcullises to fool robbers

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising (2018)
programme.desc: The son of war hero Stacker Pentecost leads a new generation of giant robot pilots against a wave of alien Kaiju creatures. Sci-fi sequel, starring John Boyega, Scott Eastwood and Cailee Spaeny

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Sergeant David 'Podders' Podmore is called out to investigate after a shooting in the Liverpool area, and following a raid at a property, a number of weapons are seized, including a potential improvised explosive device made out of industrial fireworks. Meanwhile, Sam Jones and Matt Coogan head to the scene of a mortar bomb discovery, while Sergeant Alex 'Swansea' Hughes is called to Llandudno, where a magnet fisherman has taken a mortar that he's found to work

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas takes over from Sandi Toksvig as host for the 2020 series, alongside returning presenter Noel Fielding and regular judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. The 12 contestants for this series have been required to form a social bubble due to Covid-19 lockdown restrictions. The contest begins with Cake Week, beginning with a signature challenge to produce a classic Battenberg. For the technical round, Paul sets the contestants the task of making a fruit sponge, and the final Showstopper Challenge gives the bakers a chance to express their creativity

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: In Devon, George visits one of the National Trust's quirkiest buildings, a bear hut on the 6400-acre Killerton estate. The main house was given away because of the socialist ideals of the aristocratic family who lived there. George unearths secrets and scandal at Baddesley Clinton Hall, a fortified Tudor manor house in Warwickshire where in the past the architecture has meant the difference between life and death, then heads home to the north-east for a walk through Gibside Estate, a landscape park with royal connections and crowned with jaw-dropping architecture

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: A special programme celebrating the show's 20th anniversary, as Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back over two decades of house-hunting together. In this episode, Kirstie and Phil recall times they helped house-hunters who were more focused on the gardens rather than the houses themselves. Architect Sam seeks a renovation project, while wife Becky wants a large garden so she can grow and sell flowers. Elsewhere, keen gardener Liz and John are in rented accommodation, so have limited scope and long for their own sprawling green, outdoor space

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Before winter arrives, Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree take on their next project, transforming a 35-foot long, eight-ton river boat into luxury guest accommodation. While Angel completely overhauls the old nautical interior with bespoke fabrics and unique crafts, Dick has the small task of installing the boat's very own wind turbine and a decking that reaches over the moat

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: An incident featuring a wheelie bin and a birthday cake sparks a bitter conflict between two neighbours in Wales, and there are explosive consequences when householders take the law into their own hands after continuous loud music drives them to distraction. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Britain's Council House Millionaires
programme.desc: Documentary about some of the nation's wealthiest buy-to-let landlords, who have made a fortune by buying up former council homes, and renting them out to those in need. Among those featured is a Manchester property magnate who buys properties in the city's less desirable areas and rents them to students at up to £400 a month for a room, a London estate agent who only deals in former council properties, and a Kent man who grew up in a council house, and recognises the quality of the construction

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: A crown green bowling team in Saydo are determined to end their losing streak, while Joe and Jan receive some devastating news concerning the future of the dog shelter. A Peterborough man who relocated to the Costa Del Sol launches his mobile cocktail bar, and a former racehorse that has been repeatedly rehomed and returned to the rescue centre may finally have found the right owner

programme.title: The All-Inclusive: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: Following groups of holiday makers as they embark on an all-inclusive week in the same resort - the Green family, the West family, and a group of friends from Crewe. In the opening episode, the Green family, who have 17 years' experience of all inclusive holidays, share their tips and tricks to save money and make the most out of what is on offer at their resort. Meanwhile, staff in the resort prepare for their busiest day of the year

programme.title: The Town the Gypsies Took Over
programme.desc: Documentary exploring Britain's oldest and most exclusive Gypsy gathering, the Appleby Horse Fair in Cumbria, which is attended by more than 10,000 travellers. The programme explores how new police restrictions are impacting on the festival's traditions, as well as the disruption caused by torrential rain, including a nearby river rising to a dangerous level. Plus, local business owners share their thoughts on the event. While some stand to make a profit from the visitors, others find the size of the fair overwhelming

programme.title: Noisy Neighbours: At War with the Noise Next Door
programme.desc: Following the work of Britain's Noise Enforcement Teams as they respond to complaints across the country and bring peace and quiet back to the nation

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Documentary in which journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. Here he exposes the rise in ram raids across the UK, with footage of two masked men using a 4x4 to pull the front off a cash machine at the University of East Anglia in Norwich. Nick also shows how detectives used laser-scanning technology to recreate a crime scene and close in on a gang that terrorised West Yorkshire pub owners in 2013

programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor visit Nottingham to chase almost £8,000 owed by a car dealership to a dissatisfied customer, while on the Isle of Wight, Brian and Del try to collect £3,700 of unpaid estate agency fees. In Lancashire, Stewart and Iain struggle to identify the person who owes almost £2,000 after a failed compensation claim, while Del and Dael try to recover nearly £3,500 from a businessman in west London

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: Undercover detective Dan must outwit someone who is alleged to have fraudulently claimed refunds on hundreds of completed journeys, while a ticketless bus passenger threatens to get the police involved. At one of the London Underground's busiest interchanges, revenue inspectors Karen and Peter stop commuters from exploiting a transport loophole

programme.title: The Expendables (2010)
programme.desc: A mercenary leads his elite team on a mission to assassinate a South American dictator, only to find their target is merely a pawn and the real power in the country is a rogue CIA agent. Feeling they have been double-crossed, they abandon the operation - but are compelled to return and save a captured rebel. Action thriller, directed by and starring Sylvester Stallone. With Jason Statham and Jet Li

programme.desc: Nick Wallis turns his attention to violence on the streets of Britain that is fuelled by drink or drugs, and finds out how technological advances are helping to fight crime and secure convictions. In Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, a CCTV operator spots a man being punched unconscious after escaping a mass brawl and does her best to keep track of the assailant and direct the police to him. There is also footage of a fight in which a man is knocked to the floor and a woman wearing stilettos stamps on his face, and an incident outside a burger bar escalates into a relentless and violent assault

programme.title: Riverdale
programme.desc: Betty and Archie race to save the school caretaker after the Black Hood declares the town has fialed his test, Jughead leads an uprising, and Fred faces a hefty medical bill

programme.title: Columbo: Agenda for Murder (1990)
programme.desc: A crooked lawyer hopes to start a promising political career, but a former client he saved from prison threatens to blow the whistle on him. The attorney murders the blackmailer and makes it look like suicide - but the shabby sleuth sees through his ruse and sets out to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Louis Zorich and Patrick McGoohan, who also directed

programme.title: Columbo: Butterfly in Shades of Grey (1993)
programme.desc: A radio presenter is plotting to sabotage his adopted daughter's plans to publish her first novel and kills one of his employees for trying to help her. He thinks he has the perfect alibi, claiming that the victim was murdered while they were talking to each other on the phone, and there is a tape recording to prove it - but his ruse fails to fool the dishevelled detective. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, William Shatner and Molly Hagan

programme.title: Columbo: Rest in Peace, Mrs Columbo (1990)
programme.desc: The wife of a criminal who died in prison swears revenge on the men she holds responsible for his incarceration - including Columbo. She kills one of her targets, and the shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. As she faces his well-honed approach to sniffing out a suspect, she plots to murder his wife. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Helen Shaver and Ian McShane

programme.title: Columbo: Old Fashioned Murder (1976)
programme.desc: A woman who has devoted her life to running her family's museum is outraged when her brother decides to sell it. Knowing of someone with criminal connections, she arranges to have her brother killed. However, just when she starts to think she has got away with it, a certain shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Joyce Van Patten, Celeste Holm and Tim O'Connor

programme.title: Columbo: A Stitch in Crime (1973)
programme.desc: Surgeon Barry Mayfield decides he needs get rid of his colleague to speed along a research project. When his partner requires heart surgery, Mayfield performs the operation himself and discreetly arranges some fatal complications. However, when he also murders a nurse who suspects the truth, he attracts the attention of the slovenly sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leonard Nimoy and Will Geer

programme.title: Columbo: Murder Under Glass (1978)
programme.desc: The crumpled detective applies his well-honed instincts to a case of blackmail and murder in the world of haute cuisine when a restaurant owner is found dead after throwing a renowned food critic off his premises. Crime drama from The Silence of the Lambs director Jonathan Demme, starring Peter Falk, Louis Jourdan, Shera Danese and Richard Dysart

programme.title: Columbo: The Bye-Bye Sky-High IQ Murder Case (1977)
programme.desc: An accountant who has a reputation as being one of the brightest men in the world realises he has to kill a fellow genius to cover up his illegal activities. He puts his remarkable intelligence to the task of covering up every possible clue that could lead back to him - but has not counted on the equally sharp mind of slovenly sleuth Columbo. Crime drama, with Peter Falk and Theodore Bikel

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sara Carter begs Gibbs to investigate her mother's murder, as she believes the local authorities have convicted the wrong man. Abby is awarded a dinner reservation for two to a new five-star restaurant in an igloo, and has to decide which co-worker deserves to go with her. Mark Harmon, Pauley Perrette and Skye P Marshall star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the attempted murder of a woman found beaten into a coma, and their only witness is her daughter, who has severe learning difficulties. The spotlight soon turns on the victim's husband, who claims to have found his wife on his return home from a business trip - but the airline passenger list reveals he was not on the flight. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A student counsellor is murdered in New York, and Benson and Stabler investigate a possible connection to her volunteer work at a refugee centre. They discover she had been helping a taxi driver who claimed to have been tortured after the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001. The trail soon leads the detectives to suspect the involvement of a doctor with links to a company that benefitted financially from the Iraq war

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A bystander is killed in a robbery, traumatising his mentally ill wife, who is later suspected of physically abusing their child. The police take the youngster into protective custody, but a lack of evidence forces them to return him home - with tragic consequences. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a teenage girl is found in the boot of a car, and inquiries soon establish she was a bully who enjoyed picking on other girls - leaving Stabler and Benson with a seemingly endless list of suspects to choose from. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mac continues the investigation into the killing of Carver's sister and discovers a bullet lodged in the corpse's chest that matches a gun registered to the chief. However, Jo warns him of the consequences of accusing a senior officer of murder. Starring Gary Sinise and John Larroquette

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Jo discover the body of a department store manager in a shop window when they apprehend a pickpocket. They suspect the thief of murder, but his excuse leads them to the victim's assistant, who appears to have planned the crime. However, they unearth evidence that her dead boss had been accused of sexual harassment and had wounds on his body indicating that he might also have been an assailant. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions, focusing on criminals in London involved in robberies, thefts, drug crimes, street brawls and weapons offences. In Soho, police officers monitor the activity of the area's 100,000 nightly visitors from a CCTV control room in an underground bunker, while in Lambeth the air support unit is called in when an armed gang are seen rampaging through the streets

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, leading Mac and his former partner William Hunt to become embroiled in a 17-year-old vendetta. Crime drama, guest starring Peter Fonda

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A near-fatal experience prompts Mac to consider ending his career, but before he makes a decision he returns to his last unsolved case so he can be at peace with his ultimate choice. He reinvestigates a robbery that ended in a double murder in 2002, and tries to find the girl who disappeared after witnessing the crime. Drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A decomposed skeleton is unearthed on a construction site and identification proves troublesome for Stone. The deceased is eventually revealed to be a man who disappeared years earlier and was presumed murdered. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Green track down a disturbed woman who has not only murdered a young mother and stolen her five-day-old son, but also managed to convince her own husband that the baby is really theirs. As the case goes to trial, another man comes forward claiming to be the child's real father, leaving McCoy and Borgia facing a dilemma

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady look into the murder of Carl Mullaly, who had recently been profiled on HardFocus, a magazine programme that identifies sex offenders. The only witness is an eight-year-old girl and detectives soon make an arrest, but learn the tabloid talk show may have been more involved than it initially appeared

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two thieves discover the skeletal remains of a woman who was believed to have died in the September 11 attacks on the World Trade Centre. It transpires that a valuable and unusual ring has been stolen from the body, and the team suspects foul play. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Elisabeth Rohm and Sam Waterston

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. First lieutenant Michael Torres gets involved in a fight before falling to the ground, and is found beaten to death the next morning. The only witness is his friend and colleague Captain Joe Westcott, who suffers from post-traumatic stress disorder and has trouble distinguishing reality from his past military experiences in the Middle East

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The bodies of two assassins are delivered to NCIS from overseas - so Tony and Ziva assume their identities and keep a rendezvous at a luxury hotel in a bid to discover who they had been sent to kill. Unfortunately, Gibbs finds out his team is not the only one working on the case. Drama, with Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Fingerprint evidence implicates Tony in a woman's death and he finds himself accused of murder. Convinced of his innocence, the other members of the team set out to clear him - even though all the facts seem to indicate he is guilty. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A model dies while filming a reality TV show at a US Marine base, and an autopsy reveals she was killed by a drug overdose administered by someone else. Inquiries lead the team to identify three possible suspects - but one of them is also murdered. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva disappear while searching for smuggled weapons at a shipyard. Gibbs is soon on the case and learns the pair were looking for a freight container thought to hold explosives from Iraq. McGee tries to get a GPS trace on the missing duo's mobiles, leaving the others struggling to find them before they come to serious harm. Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When evidence reveals an NCIS team member is a hitman's latest target, the team members are tasked with searching through old case files to determine who is seeking vengeance. Reeves dies from injuries sustained in the gunfight with the mugger, having instinctively protected Abby, who ends up in the hospital. It transpired the mugger was hired by Robert King, who held a grudge against Abby since his arrest. Looking over Reeves' body in the autopsy room, Abby vows to carry on his wish to start a charity in his native London, deciding to leave NCIS to do so. Pauley Perrette stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A college student is murdered in an attack bearing all the hallmarks of a notorious serial killer. Stabler and the team believe it is the work of a copycat and their investigation leads them to a group of loyal followers, including a man who glorifies the crimes in his comic books

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and the team become embroiled in the hard-hitting world of ultimate fighting when a teenager's body is found with her lips cut off. DNA traces lead to a cage fighter with a dubious record, while footage from the victim's mobile phone offers a link to two members of a university fraternity house. Starring Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a six-year-old boy who is believed to have collapsed during an exorcism at a late-night church service. However, forensics reveal the victim was smothered before the rite took place, casting suspicion on his foster parents and social worker. Starring Christopher Meloni, Ice-T and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The police discover a 12-year-old boy posted sinister threats to a girl in an internet chatroom and suspect his anger stems from sexual abuse. The trail soon leads Benson and Stabler to a billionaire known for his generous donations to charities and his hospitality to young house guests

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A person dressed in a clown costume murders a bakery owner. The evidence leads to a man from Flack's past who reluctantly agreed to join the witness protection programme to testify against drug dealers. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cahill

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Jo investigate the death of a Spanish club promoter and are surprised to find a police officer from Barcelona at the crime scene. They realise that, for diplomatic reasons, he is allowed to be there - until Mac discovers he is withholding information about the case. As the investigation proceeds, however, the New York detectives begin to suspect they are dealing with something other than a straightforward homicide. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An unidentified woman found dead in an alleyway appears to have taken a heroin overdose, but further inspection reveals someone may have had a hand in administering the fatal drugs. Mac recognises the victim as conspiracy-obsessed Tessa James, and as he works to explore whether there was truth in her stories, the investigation leads to an elite gentlemen's club that has traces of blood on the walls. Starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: The return of the comedy drama about a New York homicide detective Laura Diamond as she navigates juggling a difficult work and home life. Laura and team race to uncover a host of family secrets in order to rescue a kidnapped diabetic boy before time runs out. When ex-husband Jake returns to work a week early to help with the case, it looks as though Laura is stuck with her new boss for good

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A teenager beats a fellow foster home resident to death, and his lawyer seeks a not guilty vedict, claiming the youth is genetically predisposed to violent behaviour because he possesses an extra Y chromosome

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant dies of ricin poisoning and the detectives' inquiries link him and his brother to a prostitution ring trafficking young women into New York. A police officer whose daughter was among the girls is the main suspect, but Green and Cassady face difficulties with the Russian consulate

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the abduction and murder of a child, following a lead to a suspected serial paedophile, who is found holding another boy captive. However, the youngster seems to be more than just an innocent victim. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A jockey is shot dead, leading Fontana and Falco into the murkier side of horse racing, where they discover the victim's prized thoroughbred was bought by a corporate boss using embezzled funds. McCoy takes control in court, but a witness's emotional outburst and the defendant's disappearance put the case in jeopardy. Starring Dennis Farina, Michael Imperioli and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the world of online romance when a garage mechanic is murdered, but the case takes a series of bizarre turns before they are able to identify the killer. Police drama, starring Anthony Anderson and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A jeweller's murder is linked to a prostitution business, and the subsequent trial puts McCoy's job on the line as interested parties try to call in old favours. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An undercover police office is killed by McGee while on duty, and Jenny approves an investigation into the death. But the decision places a strain on her relationship with Gibbs as the team tries to prove that the agent was not culpable, despite the evidence building against him. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A model dies while filming a reality TV show at a US Marine base, and an autopsy reveals she was killed by a drug overdose administered by someone else. Inquiries lead the team to identify three possible suspects - but one of them is also murdered. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A commander who knows the location of a shipment of nuclear fuel rods is abducted, and the team is called in to try to identify the kidnapper. However, as the investigation turns up new evidence, it appears someone might have had a very different motive for silencing the officer. Guest starring Zac Efron

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The wives of two marines are murdered, and although Gibbs initially suspects they were victims of domestic violence, subsequent developments suggest the case may involve professional killers who already have their next victim in mind. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate when a legal clerk is found murdered in a judge's house. The judge, Dutch Blakemore, admits he was having an affair with the victim, and it soon emerges he was plagiarising her work. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU puts out a media appeal for information on a youngster found on the streets of New York covered in someone else's blood. The child's alleged father turns up to collect him, but tests reveal he is not biologically related - a development that makes Stabler doubt whether Kathy's unborn child is really his. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the murder of a 14-year-old immigrant girl, and initially suspect the involvement of a thug with a history of violence - but the case is complicated by the discovery that the victim was married to a 35-year-old polygamist

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An assistant district attorney is found strangled in his car in an area notorious for prostitution. Benson is shocked to realise she briefly dated the victim and refuses to believe he would have paid for sex. As investigations get under way, DNA evidence reveals the dead man might have been gay. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The rape and murder of a criminology student puts detectives Stabler and Benson on the trail of a killer with an expert knowledge of forensics. A discovery about the victim's mentor places him at the top of their list of suspects - but as further evidence is gathered, it begins to seem that someone might have tried to frame him for the crime

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigators find three bodies when they arrive at the scene of an accident involving a truck full of revellers, and find a lead when one of the dead is identified as the daughter of an unpopular trade-union boss. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Carmine Giovinazzo and Hill Harper

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates a series of shootings at a nightclub, where a bartender and two patrons were killed by a hitman, who then proceeded to kidnap someone. Hawes is stunned when the abducted woman is revealed to be Camille Jordanson, a childhood friend who has become embroiled in a messy counterfeit pill scheme and seems to have made a few enemies in the criminal underworld. Guest starring singer Ne-Yo

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Jenni Falconer helps a couple who want to start a new stress-free life in the Republic of Ireland and are seeking a home on Donegal's unspoilt coast for a budget of £180,000. Martin is a DIY enthusiast and Kelly works in marketing. They presently live in Tonbridge, Kent, but are tired living in a built-up area

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Dartford to meet Scott and Jenny, whose third son Charlie was born with cerebral palsy and developmental delay. The boy needs round-the-clock care, which his mother gave up work to provide, but now he is 13, the family are struggling to cope in their small home. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their end terrace, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they don't stray too far from her vision

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his crack team of builders, plasterers and electricians come to the aid of Frank and Christine Burrows in Wigan, Greater Manchester. In 2012, the Burrows' 35-year-old son Mark retrained as a scaffolder to follow in his father's footsteps, but was paralysed as the result of an unprovoked attack that left him with severe brain damage. Mark now needs constant care, but the Burrows' family home is not yet fit for purpose, so Frank and Christine have been forced to take their son to a care home 15 miles away. With the help of flamboyant designer Laurence Llewelyn Bowen, Nick's experts set about constructing a self-contained apartment alongside the Burrows' two-bedroom bungalow, which will provide Mark with the space, independence and security he will need to return home for good after spending two years away

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles comes to the aid of Liz and Jason Liversidge, a Hull couple in desperate need of help in future-proofing their family home. Not long after getting married and starting a family, Jason was diagnosed with both Fabrys disease, which causes a build-up of poisonous toxins in the body, and Motor Neurone Disease, which drastically reduced his life expectancy. The pair also discovered that Jason would have passed Fabrys disease on to his two daughters, which means that once her husband is gone, Liz will need all the help she can get in managing her children's condition. Nick joins forces with designer Oliver Heath and an army of volunteers to put together a home in which Jason can build meaningful memories with his girls, but one which also gives Liz the best chance of providing for their future needs

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Philip Serrell and Tom Scott begin their road trip in St Buryan, Cornwall, before heading to Wareham in Dorset, where they discover whose haul proves most popular with buyers

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Tom Scott start their day near Dartmoor at Ashburton, Devon. They travel around the county in search of bargains, before arriving at auction in Chudleigh to find out whose haul proves most popular with buyers

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Philip Serrell and Tom Scott start their journey in Exeter, Devon, before travelling through Dorchester in Dorset. They end their day at an auction house in Upwey, where they hope to make a profit from their purchases

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

Now they're looking for their very own property there, initially to use as a holiday home before they move out full-time in the next few years. Jonnie Irwin guides them through the local market and shows them five properties for their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the cliffs at Flamborough Head and through Clumber Park, Nottinghamshire

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White treks along the Isle of Man's stunning coast and visits Sprotbrough in South Yorkshire

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Traditionally minded new father PJ hopes his skills as a management consultant will serve him well when he is sent to spend a week working at Tadpoles Nursery in Chelsea, west London, but his idea of arranging a football lesson for the youngsters ends in chaos. Meanwhile, gay budding parent Richard manages to lose track of two of his charges in an art gallery, and 21-year-old first-time dad Kadmiel gets off to a shaky start when placed in charge of snack time and reading practice for the nursery's four-year-olds

programme.title: Haunters of the Deep (1984)
programme.desc: An American businessman tries to reopen a Cornish tin mine, but the ghosts that haunt the tunnels have other ideas. Supernatural drama, starring Andrew Keir and Barbara Ewing

programme.title: Cup Fever (1965)
programme.desc: A crooked councillor tries to make life difficult for a children's football team, so they will lose a match against his son's side. However, help is at hand from Manchester United manager Matt Busby. Children's drama, starring David Lodge and Busby as himself, with cameos from a host of football stars

programme.title: I Was a Spy (1933)
programme.desc: A Belgian nurse infiltrates German High Command to supply the British with vital information during the First World War One. Fact-based spy thriller, starring Madeleine Carroll, Conrad Veidt, Donald Calthorp and Nigel Bruce

programme.title: Are You Being Served? (1977)
programme.desc: Havoc descends on the coast of Spain as the motley Grace Brothers crew arrive for their annual holiday on the Costa Plonka, which does not exactly live up to the brochure's promise of rest and relaxation. Comedy based on the TV series, starring John Inman, Wendy Richard, Mollie Sugden, Frank Thornton, Trevor Bannister and Arthur English

programme.title: I'm a Stranger (1952)
programme.desc: An Englishman comes to India to claim his inheritance, only to find his grandfather's will has gone missing. To discover what has become of it and acquire his rightful fortune, he needs the help of a detective, a window cleaner - and movie star Greta Gynt. Comedy, starring Patric Doonan and James Hayter, with Gynt playing herself

programme.title: The Windsors
programme.desc: Documentary offering an insight into how King George V changed the royal family surname from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor as World War One began. The programme explores his fine upstanding public image and profiles the trials and triumphs faced by his five sons _ especially the heir to the throne

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams reveals how as Hitler's plans to invade Britain took shape, members of Churchill's Resistance Movement got ready to defend the nation, consulting their specially-prepared instruction manuals on explosives and killing techniques

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: London-based current affair series, with Michael Hayman

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The Princess Elizabeth Cup sees troopers compete to be the smartest in the Household Cavalry. Recruits seeking promotion attend gruelling tests involving live rounds and grenades, and the trainee horse-riders attempt their first canter

programme.title: A London Community in Lockdown
programme.desc: A heartfelt look at life during lockdown in the Listraban community in London, a record of a moment in time that will be in the history books for generations to come

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Closing the Ring (2007)
programme.desc: An old woman consumed by grief following the death of her husband receives a message from a stranger who claims to have found a ring belonging to her that was lost decades before. The discovery brings to light secrets from her past and causes her to look back to the beginnings of her marriage. Drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Christopher Plummer and Neve Campbell

programme.title: The Conversations (2016)
programme.desc: A disillusioned dentist tries to become a stand-up comic, but finds he is unable to perform on stage due to his unrequited love for an American woman who is about to return to the States, never to be seen again. In desperation he seeks a way to have her permanently erased from his memory. Comedy drama, starring Haider Zafar and Daniella Down

programme.title: Mad Dog Morgan (1976)
programme.desc: An Irishman seeking his fortune in the Australian Gold Rush ends up in prison when driven to robbery out of desperation. After 12 years of abuse, he is released and becomes an outlaw, determined to make society pay for his suffering - and becoming a hero to the downtrodden in the process. Fact-based Western, starring Dennis Hopper and Jack Thompson
